translated: Everyone's saying how cute they are.
It really hits home how rare it is to see Niigo wearing white.
Having done so many of these AfterTalks now...
it might not be a full-on smile,
but seeing a version of Mafuyu with so much warmth makes me so happy.
Because the event story itself was so heartwarming,
I think it's wonderful how all the illustrations have this gentle warmth to them.
